verdict: The current system is a normalized and intelligence-enriched catalog, not an exhaustively verified external product catalog.

fieldProvenance.confidenceMeaning: Matches the imported product export, but not externally validated.
Present when supplied by export; not checked against manufacturer sites or barcode databases.
Good first-pass separation; needs review for care/color ambiguity.
Industry-informed heuristic; not manufacturer-certified per SKU.

fieldProvenance.provenance: Curated static dictionary for major brands
fieldProvenance.confidenceMeaning: Useful professional knowledge layer; incomplete for long-tail brands and not fetched at build time.

fieldProvenance.provenance: Observed salon usage reports and Neon usage rows for inventory counts
fieldProvenance.confidenceMeaning: Represents observed data, not official product truth.

missingCapabilities: Persisted source evidence with URL, title, matched fields, confidence, and timestamp.

Neon-backed catalog and dictionary tables as the source of truth.
